name: The Mechanist Application Sigil
description: A neutral project sigil used as a safe registry bootstrap portrait-class image until Stage 8 gives portraits their own partitioned semantic catalog.

name: The Mechanist Small UI Sigil
description: A compact application icon suitable for registry smoke tests and future UI icon audit rows.

name: Domestic Water Barrel
description: A utilitarian water barrel for hab rooms, ration corners, and storage spaces; it must not be substituted with a generic shelf or crate icon.

name: Water Dispenser Fixture
description: A household water dispenser and utility surface representing stored potable water, washing access, or ration-water custody.

name: Supply Shelf Fixture
description: A stock shelf or service post used for supplies and room support; this is deliberately distinct from a water barrel.

name: Plain Hab Cot
description: A narrow worker cot for hab cells, shelters, dormitories, and barracks-adjacent civilian sleeping rooms; not a child mat or unrelated domestic decoration.

name: Worn Underhive Bed
description: A battered underhive sleeping surface with enough dignity left to be called furniture by someone desperate.

name: Scrap Knife
description: A crude sharpened scrap blade; any item named knife, shiv, or dagger should prefer this family rather than a firearm fallback.

name: Bolter Weapon Icon
description: A bolt weapon icon reserved for bolters and bolt-pattern firearms; it must not represent scrap knives or ordinary improvised melee tools.

name: Heavy Ranged Weapon Icon
description: A large firearm silhouette for heavy ballistic or exotic ranged weapons when the precise weapon family has not yet been split into its own ID.

name: Arbites Armor Icon
description: A dark armored uniform silhouette suitable for Arbites or carapace-style protection previews; it is reserved for armor/clothing equipment and not for newspapers.

name: Newspaper Item Icon
description: A folded newspaper or printed sheet icon used for readable paper, local newsprint, and low-grade information goods; it must not point at a stubcarbine or firearm cell.

name: Hive Bulkhead Wall
description: A dense riveted wall panel for ordinary hive rooms and corridors; it represents a one-tile wall boundary, not a double-thick placement excuse.

name: Exterior Maintenance Bulkhead
description: A hardened maintenance-side bulkhead used near outer service corridors and void-adjacent boundaries.

name: Sewer Bulkhead Wall
description: A pipe-heavy sewer or utility wall tile for waste channels, sump maintenance rooms, and damp subterranean service spaces.

name: North-South Road Segment
description: A road lane segment intended for district movement channels and plaza-connected circulation spines.

name: East-West Road Segment
description: A road lane segment for horizontal street runs; it is road fabric, not a room floor or generic corridor.

name: Sidewalk Frontage Tile
description: A pedestrian frontage tile whose direction should help distinguish road-facing and room-facing sides during later generation migration.

name: Industrial Corridor Tile
description: A hard industrial corridor floor segment used for interior access paths and room-to-room circulation.

name: Exterior Maintenance Corridor Tile
description: A service-corridor tile for outer maintenance loops; it should connect to same-family service corridors rather than spawning a second boundary band.

name: Sewer Corridor Tile
description: A damp sewer corridor tile intended for waste, sump, and subterranean utility passages.

name: Corpse Loot Container
description: A corpse or death-remnant container marker; it is only for dead entities, decay, cleanup, or loot state and must never be used as generic floor cover.

name: Atmospheric Condenser Machine
description: A compact emergency condenser or water-making machine used by survival and utility systems.

name: Emergency Assembler Machine
description: A small fabrication apparatus representing crude automated assembly or emergency manufacturing support.

name: Emergency Boiler Machine
description: A compact boiler-like utility machine used for primitive steam and emergency industrial support.

name: Emergency Forge Machine
description: A small smelter or forge machine for early metalworking and bootstrapped industrial production.

name: Archway Door Tile
description: Open archway or threshold tile used by room entrances and saint alcove fallback; it is a transition fixture, not a wall or floor.

name: Standard Door Tile
description: Ordinary room door tile used for standard entrances and access control surfaces.

name: Locked Door Tile
description: Locked room door tile used where access control must be visually distinct from open thresholds.

name: Vent Panel Door Tile
description: Vent or service-panel threshold tile for maintenance hatches and narrow access points.

name: Security Door Tile
description: Security door or controlled threshold tile used for restricted zones and secure transitions.

name: Double Bulkhead Door Tile
description: Double-door transition tile reserved for road-end or maintenance-bulkhead transitions, not literal map-edge escape doors.

name: Buildable Storage Crate
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for player-built storage crates and editor crate palette entries. It is a placeable container preview, not a generic shelf fallback.

name: Buildable Workbench Fixture
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for crude workbenches and bench-like production fixtures awaiting dedicated workshop art.

name: Buildable Barricade Fixture
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for barricades, cover, and defensive obstruction previews.

name: Buildable Alarm Trap
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for alarm traps and trap-preview entries; locked entries may show this preview but must remain inert.

name: Buildable Shop Counter
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for shop counters, licensed counters, and commerce-addon previews.

name: Buildable Sandbag Line
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for sandbag lines and improvised defensive frontage.

name: Buildable Razor Wire Coil
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for razor wire, barbed wire, and wire trap previews.

name: Buildable Light Stub Turret
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for low-tier turrets and visible locked turret entries.

name: Buildable Powered Defense Turret
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for powered turret, power-turret, and general turret previews.

name: Buildable Heavy Stub Turret
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for heavier PDF-style turret previews.

name: Buildable Arbites Suppression Turret
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for sanctioned Arbites suppression turret previews.

name: Buildable Noble Sentry Turret
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for noble/gilded sentry turret previews.

name: Buildable Micro Lab
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for emergency micro-lab and lab construction previews.

name: Buildable Crude Chemical Bench
description: Stage 6 construction-menu asset for crude chemical bench and laboratory-equipment preview routing.

name: Watch Post Sensor Fixture
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for watch posts, guard nodes, and simple alarm/sensor posts.

name: Alarm Panel Fixture
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for alarm panels and security-control interactables.

name: Light Fixture
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for light sources and lighting interactables.

name: Light Switch Fixture
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for switch-controlled lights and wall switch interactables.

name: Motion Sensor Fixture
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for sensors, security masts, and detection interactables.

name: Planted Explosive Fixture
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for explosive traps, ambush nodes, and danger-preview entries.

name: Clinic Or Public Service Counter
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for clinic stalls and service counters until more specialized medicae counter art is assigned.

name: Terminal / Cogitator Fixture
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for terminals, cogitator cores, and interactable console previews.

name: Newspaper Vending Fixture
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for newspaper dispensers and public information interactables.

name: Long Bar Counter Fixture
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for bar, market, and long counter placeables.

name: Faction Representative Counter
description: Stage 6 fixture asset for trader counters, faction counters, and representative desks.
